Day advanced to 2026-03-14.
8,224 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
54 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 2 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-15): ['506444', '529060']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (276 resolved, 54 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
